summary: Strong TypeScript/Bun implementation with clear architecture: proper types, error handling, modular functions (validator.ts, formatter.ts), and comprehensive test fixtures. Workflow follows most practices (pinned checkout@v4, oven-sh/setup-bun@v2, least-privilege permissions) but fails best practice at line 25: `bun-version: latest` should be pinned to specific version (e.g., 1.0.0) for reproducibility. Test harness (run-tests.ts) is well-structured but slightly complex (could extract temp repo setup helpers). Code is concise with no duplication or dead code. Minor: fixture file dependencies implicit in workflow but handled well by test harness.
